title: Frosty Day
description: New mobs, structure, boss and other cold stuff! ❄️
body:
# FrostyDay

## Iceologer
Do you remember how Mojang wanted to add Iceologer to the game? I decided to bring this idea to an end! Meet Iceologer as I see it. Iceologer spawns in his hut in snowy biomes and drops Ominous Ice Bottle and something else with a slight chance... He also often participates in raids.

## Bonebeak
Bonebeak is a small skeleton bird that spawns in the snowy plains. It's not very dangerous, but it can become a true threat if you use the **Ominous Ice Bottle** on it!

## Frostybeak
Frostybeak is an existence shrouded in frosty horror. He can be summoned by giving the Bonebeak an Ominous Ice Bottle. This is a boss that can be killed in the initial stages of the game.

### How to craft
Frostybeak drops Ice Crystal, which is needed to upgrade some items. To upgrade items, you need to drop the Crystal and Shield/Turtle Helmet/Fishing Rod on the Smithing Table.


<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

### Frosty Shield
An improved version of the shield, when hitting them there is a chance to launch an icicle that causes damage to enemies.

### Ice Diver
An improved version of the helmet that gives along with Underwater Breathing gives Dolphin Grace and Luck if you are not in the water.

### Frozen Catcher
An improved version of the fishing rod, which allows you to catch more interesting loot.

### Grimoire
With it, you will be able to create Ice Chunks like an Iceologer.

</details>

[Iva in Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/frosty-day/)
